rules_fired.name: Failed Both Semesters
rules_fired.message: No units approved in either semester

reasoning_chain: [CRITICAL] No Units Approved Sem 1: Student approved 0 units in semester 1
[CRITICAL] Failed Both Semesters: No units approved in either semester
priority_flags: ⚑ Displaced Student — May Need Extra Support
actions: Emergency intervention — escalate to department head
agent2.override_reason: Expert rates risk higher than ML. Key: No Units Approved Sem 1, Failed Both Semesters

agent3.summary: This student is at high risk due to failing both semesters and not having any units approved in the first semester.

interventions.action: Schedule a meeting with the student to discuss their academic performance and potential solutions.
Review the student's academic plan and discuss potential course selection for the upcoming semesters.
Refer the student to academic support services such as tutoring or study groups if needed.

agent3.message_to_student: We are here to support you in achieving your academic goals. Let's work together to develop a plan to improve your performance and ensure your success.
